channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This brain-computer interface allowed a stroke survivor to speak after 18 years
item.description: Scientists have developed a device that can translate thoughts about speech into spoken words in real time. Although it’s still experimental, they hope the brain-computer interface could someday help give voice to those unable to speak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: U.S. seeks to ramp up social media data collection. Here’s what to know about Homeland Security’s plans
item.description: U.S. immigration officials are asking the public and federal agencies to comment on a proposal to collect social media handles from people applying for benefits such as green cards or citizenship, to comply with an executive order from President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Interest in foldable mobile phones is declining
item.description: Sales of foldable mobile phones are expected to fall by 4% this year compared to 2024, according to a new forecast by research firm Counterpoint. If the forecast comes true, it would be the biggest decline to date for the category.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NASA's newly returned astronauts say they would fly on Boeing's Starliner capsule again
item.description: NASA's celebrity astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams say they would fly on Boeing's Starliner capsule again.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple’s Swift language gets version manager
item.description: Apple has introduced swiftly 1.0, a version manager for the Swift programming language that is intended to ease the process of installing, managing, and updating the user’s Swift tool chain. Swiftly 1.0 was announced March 28.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data
item.description: Neil Evans, acting Program Executive Director for electronic health record modernization at VA said the VA has always had some form of electronic health record. The post At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025
item.description: The three keys to building a resilient cyber culture is demonstrating leadership commitment, continually improving and staying flexible. The post Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Navigating the future of national tech independence with sovereign AI
item.description: Sovereign AI refers to a national or regional effort to develop and control artificial intelligence (AI) systems, independent of the large non-EU foreign private tech platforms that currently dominate the field.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Mcdermott, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 23andMe’s rise and fall, in four charts
item.description: Just months after it started trading on the Nasdaq in June 2021, the company was valued as high as $5.8 billion. As of Friday, the firm’s shares were worth less than a dollar.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft's New 'Black Screen of Death' for Windows 11 - Analysis and Reaction
item.description: Windows 11's new 'Black Screen of Death' is a simplified error screen that may cause confusion with system update reboots, argues Microsoft must do better to provide clarity on errors.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Terraform's Dominance in IaC Market Under Threat
item.description: HashiCorp's Terraform faces competition from open source challengers and cloud heavyweights, but its holistic approach to infrastructure life-cycle management positions it favorably to address evolving enterprise needs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Worldwide spending on genAI to surge by hundreds of billions of dollars
item.description: CIOs should prepare for a 76.4% rise in global generative AI (genAI) spending this year, driven by improved foundational models and growing demand, according to a Gartner research report released today.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft cheat sheets: Dive into Windows and Office apps
item.description: Need to get up to speed on the latest features in Excel? Wrestling with an old version of Word? Finding your way around Windows 11 or looking to get more out of Windows 10? Computerworld’s cheat sheets are easy-to-use guides to help you navigate Microsoft’s core productivity software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump calls 'never ending' Signal leak story 'old and boring,' blasts media
item.description: President Trump slammed the media for its “never-ending” coverage of the Signal group chat leak, calling it “old and boring.” In a post Sunday on Truth Social, Trump praised Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: How to bring Apple’s ‘Hide My Email’ privacy to Android and Windows
item.description: Have you ever wanted to sign up for an online service but you didn’t want to provide your real email address as part of the process? There’s a good chance your email address has your actual name in it. Or perhaps you want to avoid the risk of getting spammed.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Facebook’s new throwback move: a feed just for friends
item.description: Meta wants to revive Facebook’s old-school appeal by introducing a new Friends Tab, which will focus solely on posts shared by a user’s friends and family. This Friends Tab will replace the section in the app that previously displayed friend requests and suggested friends.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk's AI Firm Buys Social Media Platform X
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk's AI firm xAI buys social media platform X, valued at $45 billion.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: China's Tron 1 robot hurdles over obstacles like they're nothing
item.description: Tron 1, a Chinese company's two-legged robot, is versatile and can walk, roll and pivot, even on rough terrain. Tron 1 stands 33 inches tall and weighs 44 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Signal chat discussion of 'clearly classified' information violated law, experts say
item.description: The inadvertent inclusion of a journalist on a Signal group chat discussing attack plans means officials likely violated the Espionage Act and public records laws while flouting guidance on how to discuss sensitive information.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: FBI warns about document conversion sites spreading malware
item.description: The FBI warns that some free online document converters load malware onto people's computers, making their private information vulnerable to attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 20 powerful women shaping the networking industry
item.description: Women are severely underrepresented in top leadership roles across the business world. Only 10.4% of the Fortune 500 companies have women CEOs. In an AP survey of S&P 500 companies, only 25 of 341 CEOs were women. That disparity extends into the technology sector.
item.dc:creator: Network World
